title: Strut: DNS Takeover
description:
Strut SF welcomes Jenö & Markie, two pioneers who helped shape West Coast rave culture, for a special night at F8! Local support from Cira! Room 2 hosted by Dirty Not Sorry!





Free entry before 11PM with Guestlist! $10 at the door!
